stat_block.craft_requirements: You are a champion with the paladin cause; supply a casting of *detect alignment* and *dispel magic*. The initial raw materials must include 120 gp of cold iron.

abilities.effect: You command the sword and point it at a creature you can see. The sword casts *detect alignment* to detect evil, but this targets only the selected creature instead of detecting in an area.
abilities.name: Activate
abilities.requirement: You hit a creature using the *holy avenger* on your previous action

abilities.effect: You cast *dispel magic* at the same level as your champion focus spells. It must target an illusion the creature you hit created, a spell affecting the creature you hit, or an item the creature you hit wears or carries. The spell or item you attempt to counteract must be within 120 feet of you.
abilities.name: Activate
abilities.requirement: You hit a creature using the *holy avenger* on your previous action

stat_block.text: The gleaming *holy avenger* is the iconic weapon of powerful paladins. The crossbar of this *+2 greater striking holy cold iron longsword* is styled to look like angel wings. Tradition holds that those who see their reflection in a *holy avenger's* highly polished blade have their faults laid bare. If you are evil, you are enfeebled 2 while carrying or wielding this weapon.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text: This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.

traits.name: Evocation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the evocation school of magic, typically involving energy and elemental forces.

traits.name: Good
traits.text: Good effects often manipulate energy from good-aligned Outer Planes and are antithetical to evil divine servants or divine servants of evil deities. A creature with this trait is good in alignment.

traits.name: Lawful
traits.text: Lawful effects often manipulate energy from law-aligned Outer Planes and are antithetical to chaotic divine servants or divine servants of chaotic deities. A creature with this trait is lawful in alignment.
